  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AttackerSuccessProbabilityAnalyzer
    Analyzes and calculates attacker success probability based on the Bitcoin whitepaper model.
    AttackMetricsCollector
    Collects metrics during simulation to compare actual attack outcomes with theoretical predictions from the Bitcoin whitepaper.
    AttackMetricsCollector.AttackOutcome
    Represents the outcome of a single attack attempt.
    BitcoinDifficultyUtility
     
    BitcoinMainDriver
     
    BitcoinNode
    Represents a node in the simulated Bitcoin network.
    BitcoinNodeFactory
    A factory for various kinds of blockchain nodes.
    BitcoinReporter
    Specialized reporter for Bitcoin simulations extending the base Reporter.
    BitcoinSimulatorFactory
    A concrete SimulatorFactory for Bitcoin network simulations.
    Block
    Represents a block in a blockchain.
    Blockchain
    Represents the blockchain structure for a Bitcoin simulation.
    BlockHeightComparator
    Comparator for Block objects that orders them based on their block height, with ties broken by block ID.
    DefaultNodeBehavior
    An abstract base class providing default behaviors for Bitcoin network nodes within the Simulation environment.
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior
    Implements a hidden chain attack strategy for Bitcoin network simulation.
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior.ReleaseStrategy
    Enumeration of attack operational states.
    HiddenChainAttackBehavior.State
    Enumeration of attack operational states.
    HonestNodeBehavior
    Implements the canonical ("honest") node behavior in the simulated Bitcoin network.
    HonestNodeBehaviorLimited
     
    MaliciousNodeBehavior_Deprecated
     
    NodeBehaviorStrategy
    Defines the strategy interface for Bitcoin node behavior within the Simulation environment.
